indications.text:
OVCON® 35 is indicated for the prevention of pregnancy in women who elect to use this product as a
method of contraception.
Oral contraceptives are highly effective. Table 2 lists the typical accidental pregnancy rates for users of
combination oral contraceptives and other methods of contraception. ...
FEMCON Fe is indicated for use by females of reproductive potential to prevent pregnancy.
